calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2011 Continued To Mar-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Defendant's Motion to Vacate Judgment.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. HELD, #2857.

Jak Marquez, Esq. for plaintiffs McAllister Street Assoc.
Defendant Francisco Aguilar present in pro per.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the moving papers and opposition filed, good cause appearing, the Court granted the motion, vacate the judgment and set the matter for Court Trial on Mar. 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. (per stipulation by the parties).
Moving party to prepare an Order and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

Order submitted and signed by Judge Ellen Chaitin.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN Clerk: Jacque Willis-McGhee Reporter: G. CASEY, 8098

C/C FOR UD DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING; PLTF PRESENT W/COUNSEL JAK MARGQUEZ, DEFT NOT PRESENT; COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF PLTF & AGAINST THE DEFT FOR RESTITUTION & LEASE FORFEITURE OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 260 MCALLISTER STREET, #103, SF, CA 94102 AND HOLDOVER DAMAGES IN THE AMT OF $745.64; COSTS IN THE AMT OF 240.00 FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $994.64; COURT SIGNS JUDGMENT PREPARED BY MR MARQUEZ.
